name: limited-justification
description: Vulnerability analysis requiring structured step-by-step justification. VulnerabilityFinding includes a Justification with UndesiredOperation (code_snippets, CWEs) and step-by-step ProgramSteps tracking variable state. The model must demonstrate a concrete execution path from function entry to the undesired operation. The prompt explicitly rejects theoretical risks, style issues, and issues prevented by existing checks.
